nodes.label: End-to-end tests driving the Streamlit app headlessly.  These cover the failure
Locate a widget by its visible label.
Locate a widget whose label starts with ``prefix``.      Metric labels carry the
The app must open on a finished analysis, not an empty screen.
A threshold above every pixel must guide the user, not crash or lie.
Switching to the brightfield RGB image must not analyse it with         fluoresc
The batch path must apply the same size limit as the single-image path.      It
A result that is wrong must say so on screen, not just in a caption.      The br
The engine choice must be offered, and must degrade safely.
The default must need no network, no GPU and no 1 GB download.
Whether or not Cellpose is installed, choosing it must be safe.          When it
Percent-marker-positive is the shape of a real fluorescence endpoint.
The bundled sample has a known positive fraction of 29.55%.
